title: HU12 8DS, Vivergo Fuels Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/WP3633KH/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Vivergo Fuels Limited   Installation name: Saltend Bioethanol Plant   Permit number: EPR/WP3633KH/V007   "
